name: "As Rainfall Cascades"
description: A decorative flower bed commonly found in Millhaven. These plants boast cascading foliage that flows like a verdant waterfall, radiating a sense of boundless vitality.\nGardeners favor these arrangements over rigidly shaped beds. With the right selection, these plants will thrive on their own terms, leaving nature to shape the garden's beauty without the need for too many guiding hands.
